Name: bSkipTutorial
Description: Deprecated, probably broken.

Name: fPlayerHealingFactor
Description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for player.

Name: fMainPartyHeroHealingFactor
Description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for main party hero.

Name: fMainPartyRegularHealingFactor
Description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for main party regular troops.

Name: fHeroHealingFactor
Description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for hero.

Name: fRegularHealingFactor
Description: Multiplier of the wound treatment skill for regular troops.

Name: fPlayerExperienceMultiplier
Description: Sets the xp multiplier the player gains by killing an enemy.

Name: fHeroExperienceMultiplier
Description: Sets the xp multiplier heroes gain by killing an enemy.

Name: fRegularExperienceMultiplier
Description: Sets the xp multiplier regular troops gain by killing an enemy.

Name: fPlayerWoundedThreshold
Description: Determines the minimum number of hitpoints a player must have to appear in battles and contribute to party skills.

Name: fHeroWoundedThreshold
Description: Determines the minimum hitpoints needed for heroes to appear in battles and contribute to party skills.

Name: fDayStartHour
Description: Defines the boundaries of day and night time.

Name: fDayEndHour
Description: Defines the boundaries of day and night time.

Name: vMapCameraMinPosition
Description: Determines the eastern and northern bounds of the world map. The map can continue past this, but parties will not be able to travel past this boundary.

Name: vMapCameraMaxPosition
Description: Determines the western and southern bounds of the world map. The map can continue past this, but parties will not be able to travel past this boundary.

Name: fMapCameraMinZoom
Description: Minimum amount of zoom out on the world map.

Name: fMapCameraMaxZoom
Description: Maximum amount of zoom out on the world map.

Name: vMapSeaSpeed
Description: Used to determine the flow speed of the ocean shader for the world map.

Name: fMapSeaDirection
Description: Angle, sea wave foam direction.

Name: fMapSeaWaveRotation
Description: Angle, this is where the tear artefact is visible on the sea.

Name: vMapRiverSpeed
Description: Used to determine the flow speed of the river shader for the world map.

Name: fMapRiverDirection
Description: Angle used to determine the flow direction of the river shader for the world map.

Name: fSpottingMultiplier
Description: Multiplier of the spotting skill, affects the visibility radius.

Name: fTrackSpottingMultiplier
Description: Multiplier of the tracking skill. If set to 0 no tracking marks will appear at the world map no matter the skill.

Name: iLeadershipSkillBonus
Description: Sets how many additional troops per leadership skill point the player can have in his party.

Name: iPrisonerManagementSkillBonus
Description: Sets how many additional prisoners per prisoner management skill point the player can have in his party.

Name: iBaseCompanionLimit
Description: Maximum amount of companions in the player party without leadership skill.

Name: fTimeMultiplier
Description: Speed with which time passes on the map screen. With 0.25 as default value 1 GAME hour is 4 seconds of REAL time.

Name: bShowPartyIdsInsteadOfNames
Description: Determines if a party’s id value is show above them instead of their name. Change to true for ease in module development.

Name: bDontLoadRegularTroopInventories
Description: Determines if the game saves inventories for regular troops (i.e. not heroes) too. Also, savegames will be a bit bigger.

Name: bShowFactionColor
Description: Determines if party names on the world map will show their faction color.

Name: bAutoCreateNoteIndices
Description: Determines whether or not automatically search through all troops/factions/towns to check if they have note text.

Name: bShowTroopUpgradesButton
Description: Determines if the mod shows the troop upgrade button.

Name: fSkillPointsPerLevel
Description: Sets how many skill points are gained per level.

Name: fAttributePointsPerLevel
Description: Sets how many attribute points are gained per level.

Name: fWeaponPointsPerLevel
Description: Sets how many weapon proficiency points are gained per level.

Name: fLevelBoundaryMultiplier
Description: Sets the multiplier for EXP needed for troop to upgrade.

Name: iAttributeRequiredPerSkillLevel
Description: Sets how many attribute points are required per skill level.

Name: iDisableDisbandOnTerrainType
Description: Used to insure parties cannot disband on certain tiles (Like passable water).

Name: bDisableForceLeavingConversations
Description: Disables the TAB end in conversations.

Name: fMapCameraMinElevation
Description: Sets the minimum distance the camera can be from the terrain in the world map.

Name: fMapCameraMaxElevation
Description: Sets the maximum distance the camera can be from the terrain in the world map.

Name: bAutoComputePartyRadius
Description: Uses the party icon model to determine party radius. Especially important for modules with large town icons as it allows parties to interact with them in expected locations, as opposed to the center of the icon.

Name: iMinBattleAdvantage
Description: Minimum value for battle advantage.

Name: iMaxBattleAdvantage
Description: Maximum value for battle advantage.
